description: Three canonical property catalog records covering a complete public property, a missing-location property, and a verified custom-domain property. Documents Booking, PMS, and Marketplace source-link backfill behavior.

expectedFailures.reason: Profile remains incomplete until structured city/country/timezone/geo are confirmed.

sourceConflictExpectations.rule: Marketplace copy may seed public profile text, but owner/admin or Booking public copy wins when verified.
Marketplace free-form location is preserved as evidence and not promoted to structured location without confidence or confirmation.
Only verified Booking/domain-verification state can enter the public read model.
